visual_analysis.description: A green soda can with 'Sprite' branding, located between a yellow lemon and a red can.
A yellow lemon to the left of the green sprite can. Its bottom edge is lower, indicating it is in front.
A red Coca-Cola can to the right of the green sprite can, partially blocking it.
A transparent plastic water bottle behind the red coca-cola can.
A brown paper bag in the background, behind the other objects.
The wooden shelf that the objects are resting on.

action_plan.explanation: The yellow lemon is in front and to the left of the target green sprite can, blocking clear access.
The red coca-cola can is next to the green sprite can and obstructs the grasp path from the right.
All obstacles have been cleared, and the green sprite can is now accessible.
